'''Varoca''' was a patron of [[Vanster Enan's Sop House]] during [[Gadrin]]'s celebrations for the 200th anniversary of the city's founding. He spent most of the day arm-wrestling with [[Oosk]]. Despite Varoca's greater strength, he only beat the [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] about half the time.<ref name="ACP">{{LivingForce|Eye of the Sun: A Cularin Presence}}</ref>

==Appearances==
*{{LivingForce|Eye of the Sun: A Cularin Presence}} {{1st}}
